rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference only visible features, not implementation-only subcomponent paths.
Ensure AGREE type declarations use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
Guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements within annex blocks.
Implementation-level bindings must be placed in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing subcomponent ports in component type annexes; use visible features instead.
Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type scopes.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
